description_long: This object is a collection of pumpkins and gourds arranged in a line, with a large, bright orange pumpkin as the most prominent feature. The pumpkin has a smooth, rounded surface and a visible stem on top, surrounded by a variety of smaller gourds in different shapes and colors, including green, yellow, and orange. The arrangement showcases a natural, organic texture with subtle ridges and color variations typical of real pumpkins and gourds. The surface of the main pumpkin appears matte and slightly rough, with a hard exterior. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on any of the pumpkins or gourds. The setting and background are neutral, making the placement location unclear.
description: A group of pumpkins and gourds, with a large orange pumpkin and a visible stem, arranged in a line with various smaller, colorful gourds.
description_view_0: A side view showing the full lineup of pumpkins and gourds, with the large orange pumpkin and its stem clearly visible at one end.
description_view_1: A narrow end-on view, mostly showing the tops of the pumpkins and the stem of the largest pumpkin.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, displaying the lineup from the other direction, with the large pumpkin now on the left and the smaller gourds extending to the right.
description_view_3: A view from the other end, showing the tops of the smaller gourds and the back of the large pumpkin.
